actions.title: Orient on project truth
actions.intent: Read stable AletheiaOS truth files and active node records.

actions.title: Orient with runtime context
actions.intent: Read stable project truth and append current run/session context.

actions.title: Build context pack
actions.intent: Build a compact context pack from stable truth, capabilities, source summary, and record inventory.

actions.title: Refresh status
actions.intent: Read active state, validation, record counts, and runtime gate status.

actions.title: Run hook-free preflight
actions.intent: Read context, model gate, validation, git status, checkpoint candidate state, and recommended next actions.

actions.title: Validate project truth
actions.intent: Check whether AletheiaOS truth state is coherent.

actions.title: Preview checkpoint
actions.intent: Validate and show checkpoint candidates without staging or committing files.

actions.title: Create checkpoint
actions.intent: Validate, screen paths, stage durable AletheiaOS state files, and create an attributed commit.

actions.title: Audit capability coverage
actions.intent: Check that runtime scripts, skills, review agents, CRUD commands, and action layer entries are documented.

actions.title: List truth records
actions.intent: List records for a truth entity such as evidence, decisions, contracts, hypotheses, risks, nodes, or session notes.

inputs.entity: Truth entity to list, for example evidence or decisions.

actions.title: Update truth record
actions.intent: Update title, status, or a markdown section for an existing truth record.

actions.title: Archive truth record
actions.intent: Archive a truth record or fixed truth file with a reason.

actions.title: List model registry entries
actions.intent: Read registered models and model gate policy state.

actions.title: Deprecate model registry entry
actions.intent: Mark a model registry entry deprecated with an explicit reason.
